overview: The world's most popular MOBA game where two teams of five champions battle to destroy the enemy's Nexus. Features strategic gameplay, skill-based combat, and hundreds of unique champions.
coreMechanics: Lane phase, jungle, and team fighting
Last-hitting minions for gold and experience
Map awareness and vision control with wards

terminology.CS: Creep Score - number of minions/monsters killed for gold
terminology.Gank: Surprise attack on an enemy, usually by the jungler
terminology.ADC: Attack Damage Carry - the main damage dealer (bot lane)
terminology.Support: Player who assists the ADC and provides utility
terminology.Jungler: Player who farms jungle monsters and ganks lanes
terminology.Baron: Powerful neutral monster that grants team-wide buff
terminology.Dragon: Neutral monsters that provide permanent team benefits
terminology.Wards: Items that provide vision on the map
terminology.Recall: Teleport back to base to heal and buy items
terminology.Roam: Leave your lane to help teammates in other areas

commonQuestions: How do I improve my map awareness?
insiderTips: Focus on last-hitting minions over trading with enemies early game
Always buy a Control Ward on your first back
Don't chase kills into unwarded areas
Group with your team after laning phase ends
Farm jungle camps when lanes are pushed
Learn to freeze minion waves near your tower
Play around your team's power spikes

roles.Top: Solo lane fighter, usually tanky or bruiser champions
roles.Jungle: Farms jungle monsters, ganks lanes, controls objectives
roles.Mid: Solo lane mage or assassin, high damage output
roles.ADC: Bot lane carry, scales with items, primary damage dealer
roles.Support: Bot lane utility, vision control, protects ADC
